## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and process improvements for Galileo AI client engagement](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to develop clearer, standardized processes for client engagements and content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Focus on creating well-defined content clusters aligned with client's product and audience before diving into individual assignments](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Importance of setting clear agendas and expectations for client calls, balancing high-level strategy with technical details](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Current Galileo AI strategy lacks clear organization and focus](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Need to create targeted content clusters based on product features and audience needs](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aim for quality over quantity: 5 well-researched articles per week instead of 10-20](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Utilize competitive analysis and keyword research to inform content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Develop a process to present comprehensive content strategy to clients](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Process Standardization

  - [Create documented, step-by-step processes for client onboarding and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Develop templates for content clusters (e.g., "What is", "How-to", etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Implement consistent structure for client calls, including clear agendas and expectation setting](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Balance technical SEO knowledge with understanding of client's business and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)

### Team Collaboration and Learning

  - [Kyle to audit current processes and provide feedback for improvements](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Marcel to document Galileo AI content strategy development process](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [Vianca to create templates for different types of content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Encourage shadowing and knowledge sharing between team members](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

### Client-Specific Actions

  - [Organize Galileo AI content into clear, targeted clusters](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Improve assignment descriptions to be more specific (e.g., "What is LLM observability?" instead of just "LLM observability")](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Follow up with Jimmy regarding Galileo AI's technical audit and migration support](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel: Spend 2-3 hours developing a comprehensive content strategy for Galileo AI, documenting the process](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [Vianca: Create a document outlining different types of content clusters and their structures](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=2407.0)
  - [Kyle: Schedule individual feedback sessions with team members](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Vianca: Follow up with Jimmy regarding Galileo AI's technical audit before sending meeting recap](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=2450.0)
  - [Team: Continue refining and standardizing processes for client engagements and content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/AWvcCjYwbPkbjkiQ18PqNRvJRgGJTRLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
